art_direction.description: An Awwwards Site-of-the-Day level editorial experience. Pushing the boundary of traditional restaurant websites by treating spicy Chettinad cuisine like high-end art. Uses a kinetic typography hero, massive negative space, numbered manifesto chapters, and spotlight-clipped imagery to convey warmth, heritage, and premium quality.

guidelines.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium

rules: No generic sans-serif (like Inter/Roboto) for headings.
Headlines MUST use tight letter spacing.
Overlines/Labels MUST be uppercase with wide tracking.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' strictly for display/headings to bring the 'spicy/warm/classic' feel.
Never use pure black or pure white. Tint blacks with deep brown/red (#0C0A09) and whites with warm sand (#F7F5F0).
Primary color (Chettinad Red) is for major CTAs and highlights.
Accent color (Golden) is for stars, badges, borders, and subtle decorative elements.
Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG contrast ratios.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient colored shadows for food items. E.g., shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(139,0,0,0.15)]
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay across the site to kill digital flatness and enhance the 'earthy/spicy' feel.
visual_enhancers.radii: Mix of sharp edges for layout containers and soft pills (rounded-full) for buttons/badges.

patterns.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line typography reveal using Framer Motion (initial hidden with y: 100%, animate to y: 0, overflow-hidden on parent).
patterns.parallax: Subtle y-axis translation on hero imagery and gallery items on scroll.
patterns.hover: Magnetic button effect or slow scale-up (scale: 1.05) on food imagery.
patterns.stagger: List items and menu grids must stagger their entrance.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding.
layouts.grid: Bento-style grids for features. Asymmetrical grids for image galleries.
layouts.header: Sticky with backdrop-blur-xl and 1px bottom border. Must toggle solid/glass based on scroll.

components.forms: Use Shadcn primitives but customize heavily. Inputs should have transparent backgrounds with solid bottom borders (editorial style) rather than full boxes.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or sharp rectangles. Primary buttons filled with Chettinad Red. Secondary buttons outlined with Golden or border color.
components.cards: Cardless approach preferred. Use image + text directly on the background, separated by ample negative space.
components.marquee: Slow, organic editorial ribbon. Monospace or Serif text. Extremely wide gaps (gap-32) between items.
components.toast: Use Sonner for all form submissions (Reservation, Contact, Newsletter).

sections_blueprint.name: Header
sections_blueprint.content: Logo, Links, Dark Mode Toggle, 'Book Table' CTA. Sticky, glassmorphism.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.content: Kinetic typography 'Experience Authentic Chettinad'. Line-by-line reveal. Subtle parallax hero image (Chef cooking or Spices) with dark vignette.

sections_blueprint.name: Editorial Marquee
sections_blueprint.content: Slow moving text: 'Palaniyappa Mess • Authentic Taste • Since 1990 • Spices of South'.

sections_blueprint.name: Manifesto (About & Why Us)
sections_blueprint.content: Numbered chapters (01. The Heritage, 02. The Spices, 03. The Craft). High-density text with massive typography and asymmetric imagery.

sections_blueprint.name: Signature Dishes
sections_blueprint.content: Carousel or grid of clipped frames (arches/tall rectangles). Spotlight on images. Chicken Biryani, Mutton Chukka, Fish Fry, etc.

sections_blueprint.name: Today's Specials
sections_blueprint.content: Premium offer cards with golden badges. Focus on Weekend Offers / Festival Specials.

sections_blueprint.name: Chef's Special / Premium Services
sections_blueprint.content: Focus on Catering & Family Hall Booking. Dark background section with golden accents.

sections_blueprint.name: Masonry Gallery
sections_blueprint.content: Real food photography, restaurant vibes, spices. Lightbox capability on click.

sections_blueprint.name: Customer Reviews
sections_blueprint.content: Minimalist typographic quotes. No standard 'card' designs. Elegant serif quotes.

sections_blueprint.name: Reservation & Contact
sections_blueprint.content: Split screen. Left: Info & Map embed. Right: Minimalist functional booking/contact form. Sonner toast on success.

sections_blueprint.name: FAQ & Newsletter
sections_blueprint.content: Shadcn accordion for FAQs. Newsletter input inline with submit button.

sections_blueprint.name: Footer
sections_blueprint.content: Massive typography logo. Links, Instagram feed, Back to top button. Very spacious.

sections_blueprint.name: Floating WhatsApp
sections_blueprint.content: Fixed bottom right. Redirects to WhatsApp with pre-filled 'Order Now' message.

hero_and_vibe.description: Chef cooking with fire in pan, perfect for hero or vibe section.
Red chilies, earthy spices for background or manifesto.

dishes.description: Dark moody Biryani in traditional pot.
Spicy Indian lamb curry / Mutton Chukka.

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute exact color variables provided. Ensure contrast is high.
Implement 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts.
Use framer-motion for line-by-line text reveal in the Hero. Wrap lines in overflow-hidden divs.
Integrate lenis for smooth scrolling (initialize in App.jsx or main layout).
Use shadcn/ui for accordion, dropdowns, and forms. Use sonner for toasts.
DO NOT use generic centered alignments. Use optical alignment, asymmetric grids, and wide spacing.
All forms MUST be fully functional (state management + toast success).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI outputs. Build something distinct and creative.
Dark colors look good without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
DO NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Never use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs.
Ensure the header does NOT have a fully transparent background.
